text.title: Before/After Examples for Extract Service and Extract Component
text.summary: Concrete code examples showing fat-to-thin transformations for the two most common patterns.

example.code: # views.py (800 lines) - fat controller class ShopView: def checkout(self, request): # validation (30 lines) # inventory check (20 lines) # payment processing (40 lines) # order creation (25 lines) # email notification (15 lines) # analytics tracking (10 lines) pass
example.note: Single method with 6 responsibilities; untestable without HTTP stack; impossible to reuse logic.
CheckoutService accepts plain dict (no HTTP types), fully testable in unit tests without HTTP stack.
Data fetching, event handling, and rendering mixed. Impossible to test or memoize each concern separately.
Parent is a composition contract; each child tests independently; hook is reusable across multiple pages.
